fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> pairs a variation axis tag with a specific value, used to select a position along that axis when creating a typeface variation.

## Examples

```csharp
var position = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
    {
        Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"),
        Value = 700.0f
    }
};
using var typeface = originalTypeface.Clone(position);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies the position of a single variation axis for a variable font.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> of the variation axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
